div.head: 175. Editorial Note
div.p:
On April 15, 1967, Francis Bator, President’s Deputy Special Assistant for National Security Affairs, testified before the President’s Task Force on Government Organization. During a presentation that focused on the larger issue of managing interdepartmental foreign pol icy-making,
Bator also commented on the specific foreign policy role of the White House staff. For text of his notes on that part of his presentation, see Document 118, Part III, Role of the White House Staff.
